message:
fix(web): Add DNA to amino acid translation for AA view mode

The web SequenceView was displaying raw DNA nucleotides (A,C,G,T) when
switching to amino acid view, instead of translating to proper amino
acids. This fix adds useMemo-based translation using translateSequence
from @phage-explorer/core:

- Positive reading frames (0,1,2): translate forward strand
- Negative reading frames (-1,-2,-3): translate reverse complement

This matches how the TUI version handles AA view via buildGrid.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
